message: Command `find / -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.txt" \) 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -qi "repo\|vul" && echo "=== {} ===" && tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | head -20' 2>/dev/null | head -100` executed with exit code 0.
